tools.name: greengrass.associateRoleToGroup
tools.description: Associates a role with a group. Your Greengrass core will use the role to access AWS cloud services. The role's permissions should allow Greengrass core Lambda functions to perform actions against the cloud.

tools.name: greengrass.associateServiceRoleToAccount
tools.description: Associates a role with your account. AWS IoT Greengrass will use the role to access your Lambda functions and AWS IoT resources. This is necessary for deployments to succeed. The role must have at least minimum permissions in the policy ''AWSGreengrassResourceAccessRolePolicy''.

tools.name: greengrass.createConnectorDefinition
tools.description: Creates a connector definition. You may provide the initial version of the connector definition now or use ''CreateConnectorDefinitionVersion'' at a later time.

tools.name: greengrass.createConnectorDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a connector definition which has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.createCoreDefinition
tools.description: Creates a core definition. You may provide the initial version of the core definition now or use ''CreateCoreDefinitionVersion'' at a later time. Greengrass groups must each contain exactly one Greengrass core.

tools.name: greengrass.createCoreDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a core definition that has already been defined. Greengrass groups must each contain exactly one Greengrass core.

tools.name: greengrass.createDeployment
tools.description: Creates a deployment. ''CreateDeployment'' requests are idempotent with respect to the ''X-Amzn-Client-Token'' token and the request parameters.

tools.name: greengrass.createDeviceDefinition
tools.description: Creates a device definition. You may provide the initial version of the device definition now or use ''CreateDeviceDefinitionVersion'' at a later time.

tools.name: greengrass.createDeviceDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a device definition that has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.createFunctionDefinition
tools.description: Creates a Lambda function definition which contains a list of Lambda functions and their configurations to be used in a group. You can create an initial version of the definition by providing a list of Lambda functions and their configurations now, or use ''CreateFunctionDefinitionVersion'' later.

tools.name: greengrass.createFunctionDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a Lambda function definition that has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.createGroup
tools.description: Creates a group. You may provide the initial version of the group or use ''CreateGroupVersion'' at a later time. Tip: You can use the ''gg_group_setup'' package (https://github.com/awslabs/aws-greengrass-group-setup) as a library or command-line application to create and deploy Greengrass groups.

tools.name: greengrass.createGroupCertificateAuthority
tools.description: Creates a CA for the group. If a CA already exists, it will rotate the existing CA.

tools.name: greengrass.createGroupVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a group which has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.createLoggerDefinition
tools.description: Creates a logger definition. You may provide the initial version of the logger definition now or use ''CreateLoggerDefinitionVersion'' at a later time.

tools.name: greengrass.createLoggerDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a logger definition that has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.createResourceDefinition
tools.description: Creates a resource definition which contains a list of resources to be used in a group. You can create an initial version of the definition by providing a list of resources now, or use ''CreateResourceDefinitionVersion'' later.

tools.name: greengrass.createResourceDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a resource definition that has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.createSoftwareUpdateJob
tools.description: Creates a software update for a core or group of cores (specified as an IoT thing group.) Use this to update the OTA Agent as well as the Greengrass core software. It makes use of the IoT Jobs feature which provides additional commands to manage a Greengrass core software update job.

tools.name: greengrass.createSubscriptionDefinition
tools.description: Creates a subscription definition. You may provide the initial version of the subscription definition now or use ''CreateSubscriptionDefinitionVersion'' at a later time.

tools.name: greengrass.createSubscriptionDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Creates a version of a subscription definition which has already been defined.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteConnectorDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a connector definition.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteCoreDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a core definition.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteDeviceDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a device definition.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteFunctionDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a Lambda function definition.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteGroup
tools.description: Deletes a group.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteLoggerDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a logger definition.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteResourceDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a resource definition.

tools.name: greengrass.deleteSubscriptionDefinition
tools.description: Deletes a subscription definition.

tools.name: greengrass.disassociateRoleFromGroup
tools.description: Disassociates the role from a group.

tools.name: greengrass.disassociateServiceRoleFromAccount
tools.description: Disassociates the service role from your account. Without a service role, deployments will not work.

tools.name: greengrass.getAssociatedRole
tools.description: Retrieves the role associated with a particular group.

tools.name: greengrass.getBulkDeploymentStatus
tools.description: Returns the status of a bulk deployment.

tools.name: greengrass.getConnectivityInfo
tools.description: Retrieves the connectivity information for a core.

tools.name: greengrass.getConnectorDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a connector definition.

tools.name: greengrass.getConnectorDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a connector definition version, including the connectors that the version contains. Connectors are prebuilt modules that interact with local infrastructure, device protocols, AWS, and other cloud services.

tools.name: greengrass.getCoreDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a core definition version.

tools.name: greengrass.getCoreDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a core definition version.

tools.name: greengrass.getDeploymentStatus
tools.description: Returns the status of a deployment.

tools.name: greengrass.getDeviceDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a device definition.

tools.name: greengrass.getDeviceDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a device definition version.

tools.name: greengrass.getFunctionDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a Lambda function definition, including its creation time and latest version.

tools.name: greengrass.getFunctionDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a Lambda function definition version, including which Lambda functions are included in the version and their configurations.

tools.name: greengrass.getGroup
tools.description: Retrieves information about a group.

tools.name: greengrass.getGroupCertificateAuthority
tools.description: Retreives the CA associated with a group. Returns the public key of the CA.

tools.name: greengrass.getGroupCertificateConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the current configuration for the CA used by the group.

tools.name: greengrass.getGroupVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a group version.

tools.name: greengrass.getLoggerDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a logger definition.

tools.name: greengrass.getLoggerDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a logger definition version.

tools.name: greengrass.getResourceDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a resource definition, including its creation time and latest version.

tools.name: greengrass.getResourceDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a resource definition version, including which resources are included in the version.

tools.name: greengrass.getServiceRoleForAccount
tools.description: Retrieves the service role that is attached to your account.

tools.name: greengrass.getSubscriptionDefinition
tools.description: Retrieves information about a subscription definition.

tools.name: greengrass.getSubscriptionDefinitionVersion
tools.description: Retrieves information about a subscription definition version.

tools.name: greengrass.getThingRuntimeConfiguration
tools.description: Get the runtime configuration of a thing.

tools.name: greengrass.listBulkDeploymentDetailedReports
tools.description: Gets a paginated list of the deployments that have been started in a bulk deployment operation, and their current deployment status.

tools.name: greengrass.listBulkDeployments
tools.description: Returns a list of bulk deployments.

tools.name: greengrass.listConnectorDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of connector definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listConnectorDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a connector definition, which are containers for connectors. Connectors run on the Greengrass core and contain built-in integration with local infrastructure, device protocols, AWS, and other cloud services.

tools.name: greengrass.listCoreDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of core definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listCoreDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a core definition.

tools.name: greengrass.listDeployments
tools.description: Returns a history of deployments for the group.

tools.name: greengrass.listDeviceDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of device definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listDeviceDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a device definition.

tools.name: greengrass.listFunctionDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of Lambda function definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listFunctionDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a Lambda function definition.

tools.name: greengrass.listGroupCertificateAuthorities
tools.description: Retrieves the current CAs for a group.

tools.name: greengrass.listGroups
tools.description: Retrieves a list of groups.

tools.name: greengrass.listGroupVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a group.

tools.name: greengrass.listLoggerDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of logger definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listLoggerDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a logger definition.

tools.name: greengrass.listResourceDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resource definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listResourceDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a resource definition.

tools.name: greengrass.listSubscriptionDefinitions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of subscription definitions.

tools.name: greengrass.listSubscriptionDefinitionVersions
tools.description: Lists the versions of a subscription definition.

tools.name: greengrass.resetDeployments
tools.description: Resets a group's deployments.

tools.name: greengrass.startBulkDeployment
tools.description: Deploys multiple groups in one operation. This action starts the bulk deployment of a specified set of group versions. Each group version deployment will be triggered with an adaptive rate that has a fixed upper limit. We recommend that you include an ''X-Amzn-Client-Token'' token in every ''StartBulkDeployment'' request. These requests are idempotent with respect to the token and the request parameters.

tools.name: greengrass.stopBulkDeployment
tools.description: Stops the execution of a bulk deployment. This action returns a status of ''Stopping'' until the deployment is stopped. You cannot start a new bulk deployment while a previous deployment is in the ''Stopping'' state. This action doesn't rollback completed deployments or cancel pending deployments.

tools.name: greengrass.updateConnectivityInfo
tools.description: Updates the connectivity information for the core. Any devices that belong to the group which has this core will receive this information in order to find the location of the core and connect to it.

tools.name: greengrass.updateConnectorDefinition
tools.description: Updates a connector definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateCoreDefinition
tools.description: Updates a core definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateDeviceDefinition
tools.description: Updates a device definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateFunctionDefinition
tools.description: Updates a Lambda function definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateGroup
tools.description: Updates a group.

tools.name: greengrass.updateGroupCertificateConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the Certificate expiry time for a group.

tools.name: greengrass.updateLoggerDefinition
tools.description: Updates a logger definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateResourceDefinition
tools.description: Updates a resource definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateSubscriptionDefinition
tools.description: Updates a subscription definition.

tools.name: greengrass.updateThingRuntimeConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the runtime configuration of a thing.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieves a list of resource tags for a resource arn.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds tags to a Greengrass resource. Valid resources are 'Group', 'ConnectorDefinition', 'CoreDefinition', 'DeviceDefinition', 'FunctionDefinition', 'LoggerDefinition', 'SubscriptionDefinition', 'ResourceDefinition', and 'BulkDeployment'.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Remove resource tags from a Greengrass Resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
